title: hibbertia hendersonii
intro: Hibbertia hendersonii, also known as Henderson's Guinea Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Hibbertia hendersonii is often used in teas, tinctures, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
